login.title: Log in to LanEntrance
login.description: Sign in with your LanCore account to continue

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email address
verifyEmail.description: Thanks for signing up! Please verify your email to continue.
verifyEmail.linkSent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

confirmPassword.title: Confirm your password
confirmPassword.description: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.

ssoStatus.title: Signing you in...
ssoStatus.description: We are completing the LanCore sign-in flow.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account settings and preferences

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Your profile is managed in LanCore
profile.name: Name

language.managedInLanCore: Change your language in your LanCore profile.

landing.title: Welcome to LanEntrance
landing.subtitle: Fast, on-site ticket check-in for your LAN events.
landing.hero: Fast, smooth check-in for every attendee.
landing.heroDescription: LanEntrance handles event entry — scan tickets, verify identities, and track attendance. Get people through the door and into the action.

scanning.title: Ticket scanning
scanning.description: Scan QR codes or look up tickets manually. Validate in seconds.

attendance.title: Attendance tracking
attendance.description: See who's checked in, who's pending, and real-time headcounts.

sso.title: LanCore SSO
sso.description: Staff authenticate via LanCore. Roles and permissions synced automatically.

landing.footer: Powered by LanEntrance — Part of the Lan-Software ecosystem

scanner.title: Scanner
scanner.description: Scan ticket QR codes to check attendees in.
scanner.cameraRequest: Allow camera access to begin scanning.

lookup.title: Ticket lookup
lookup.description: Find a ticket by name, email, or ticket code.
lookup.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or code

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Check-in statistics for the current event

events.title: Select event
events.description: Choose the event to work with

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
